+AII-11 MVP Plan: Unified Data Backbone
+
+- Objectives
+  - Define a single data backbone to unify data sources, history, and governance across AI Investment System modules.
+  - Provide stable contracts and adapters for multiple sources, with an auditable trail of changes.
+
+- MVP Scope
+  - Data models: core entities, schemas, and versioning.
+  - Core data interface: a minimal, well-defined contract for read/write operations.
+  - Adapters: sketches for at least two data sources (e.g., source A and source B).
+  - Audit trail: basic logging of changes and accesses.
+  - Integration plan: path to gradually integrate with existing modules.
+
+- Milestones
+  1) Requirements and data model draft
+  2) Core interface design (contracts between modules)
+  3) Adapter sketches for 2 data sources
+  4) MVP integration pathway and test plan
+  5) Handoff plan to CEO/Founding Engineer
+
+- Deliverables
+  - AII-11 MVP plan document (this file) and a lightweight schema diagram.
+  - Starter code scaffold (minimal) to illustrate the interface and data flow.
+
+- Ownership and notes
+  - Owner: bee1828f-9230-4522-9ade-08278be5ccd4
+  - Status: To Do (will be moved to In Progress when started)
+
+- Definition of Done
+  - Plan reviewed and approved in Inbox.
+  - Requirements and design committed in repository, ready for implementation.

+AII-11 MVP Plan: Unified Data Backbone
+
+- Context
+  - Trigger: Heartbeat task AII-11 from CEO inbox. Objective: draft MVP plan for a unified data backbone.
+
+- Goals
+  - Define a core data model, a minimal interface, and adapters for at least two data sources.
+  - Establish a lightweight audit trail and an integration plan for existing modules.
+
+- MVP Scope
+  - Data models: core entities, versioning, and metadata.
+  - Core interface: read/write contracts for modules to consume data.
+  - Adapters: sketches for two sources with a simple data flow example.
+  - Audit trail: basic logging of operations and data changes.
+  - Plan for integration with current AI Investment System modules.
+
+- Milestones
+  1) Draft requirements and data model
+  2) Define core interface contracts
+  3) Sketch adapters for two data sources
+  4) Define MVP integration path and test plan
+  5) Prepare handoff to CEO/Founding Engineer
+
+- Deliverables
+  - MVP plan document, lightweight schema diagram, starter scaffold outline.
+
+- Next Steps
+  - Convert plan to actionable tasks and begin code scaffolding in a follow-up commit.
